positive: Minimalist celestial adventure scene, featuring a stylized, crescent-moon guided astronaut floating among abstract, bioluminescent nebula clusters and geometric star constellations. The style should be modern vector art mixed with cosmic psychedelic linework, utilizing a limited palette of deep sapphire blue, vibrant teal, stardust gold, and stark white against a dark void background. Focus on clean, strong silhouettes and high contrast for apparel printing. The composition should be perfectly centralized and balanced, giving a sense of infinite journey and wonder. The entire image must be suitable for repeating or single-placement textile printing, emphasizing bold lines and distinct shapes.
